evidenceSnippetOriginal: By requiring all undergraduate students to complete AI-focused coursework, we aim to graduate 10,000 AI-skilled professionals by 2030, directly supporting Saudi Arabia’s vision and the goals set by the National Center for Artificial Intelligence.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: KFUPM says all undergraduate students are required to complete AI-focused coursework and states a goal of 10,000 AI-skilled graduates by 2030.
evidenceLocator: AI+X page, Advancing AI Capabilities in Saudi Arabia
